title: rubus wendtii
intro: Rubus wendtii, also known as the Hawaiian raspberry or ohia lehua, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus wendtii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus wendtii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
